revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Text replacement - "Geographical disambiguation" to "Place name disambiguation"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{dmbox | type = disambig | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} | text = {{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Disambiguation page short description}}}}This [[Help:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page lists articles about distinct geographical locations with the same name.
If an [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|namespace=0}} internal link] led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article. }}{{main other | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}} | county = | uscounty = | township = | #default = }} | }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:County name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{dmbox | type = disambig | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} | text = {{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Disambiguation page short description}}}}This [[Help:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page lists articles about distinct geographical locations with the same name.
If an [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|namespace=0}} internal link] led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article. }}{{main other | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}} | county = | uscounty = | township = | #default = }} | }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:County name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{dmbox | type = disambig | nocat = {{{nocat|}}} | text = {{#if:{{{nocat|}}}||{{Disambiguation page short description}}}}This [[Help:Disambiguation|disambiguation]] page lists articles about distinct geographical locations with the same name.
If an [{{fullurl:Special:WhatLinksHere/{{{page-title|{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}}|namespace=0}} internal link] led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article. }}{{main other | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{1|}}}}} | county = | uscounty = | township = | #default = }} | }}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:redirect|isRedirect|{{TALKPAGENAME}}}}|yes|}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:County name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:United States county name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Township name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Place name disambiguation pages]] [[Category:Unsynchronized disambiguation talk pages]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
